overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a space simulation game, showing a terrestrial planet and starfield. The player performs a slow panoramic survey of the surrounding space, observing the planet, sun, and nebula clouds before returning to forward orientation.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft cockpit in orbit above terrestrial planet

agents.ego_description: pilot stationary in cockpit observing the planet and starfield

entered.detail: blue and white planet with atmosphere visible on the left side of viewport
bright white star illuminating the scene from the center distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a stable first-person view from a spacecraft cockpit. A large terrestrial planet dominates the left side of the viewport while a bright sun shines from the center distance. The spacecraft appears stationary in orbit, with the pilot observing the cosmic vista.

events.description: spacecraft begins slow rightward and upward pan to survey surrounding space
terrestrial planet moves out of viewport as camera turns toward deep space

agents.ego_description: pilot initiating turn to survey the space environment and nebula regions

entered.detail: diffuse greenish gas clouds becoming visible in the deep space background

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft begins a slow turning maneuver, panning right and upward. The terrestrial planet gradually exits the left side of the frame as the view opens up to deep space. A greenish nebula becomes visible in the distance while the sun shifts toward the left edge of the viewport.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space nebula observation above orbital plane

events.description: view shifts to darker nebula region with diffuse greenish gas clouds filling the viewport

agents.ego_description: pilot continuing upward pan to observe the nebula and starfield above the orbital plane

segments.scene_description: The camera continues tilting upward, focusing on the expansive nebula above the spacecraft. The sun disappears from view as the viewport fills with dark space and diffuse greenish nebula clouds. The lighting becomes darker as the ship faces away from the sun toward the deeper cosmos.

events.description: camera begins panning down to return to standard forward-facing view

agents.ego_description: pilot completing the survey and returning to forward-facing position

entered.detail: cluster of bright stars visible in the forward viewport as camera returns to center

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft completes its survey by panning back down to a forward-facing orientation. The nebula moves out of view as a distant star cluster becomes visible in the center viewport. The scene stabilizes with the cockpit facing forward into the starfield.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic sweep from a bright planetary orbit into the dark depths of a nebula before returning to a forward-facing starfield. It begins with a stable view from a spacecraft cockpit, where a large terrestrial planet and a bright central sun dominate the vista. As the spacecraft begins a slow turning maneuver, the planet slides out of frame to the left and the sun shifts toward the edge, opening the view to a distant greenish nebula. The camera then tilts further upward, causing the sun to disappear entirely as the viewport fills with the dim, diffuse light of the nebula clouds. Finally, the ship pans back down to a forward orientation, moving the nebula out of sight to reveal a distant star cluster centered in the viewport.
